_description: Each post has 'card' (listing grid card), 'seo' (/blog/[slug] metadata), 'detail' (full post body). sharedSidebar + sharedComments are pulled into every detail page so they stay consistent.

card.title: Lipsum has been the industry's standard dummy text
card.excerpt: We prioritize eco-friendly practices that protect natural resources and ensure long-term agricultural productivity for.

seo.title: The Pride of Harvest: A Farmer's Lifetime Achievement | Agriva
seo.description: Stories of dedication, sustainable farming, and rural communities — the women and men behind global agriculture.

detail.title: The Pride of Harvest: A Farmer's Lifetime Achievement
intro: Women constitute a significant portion of the agricultural workforce globally, contributing immensely to food security and rural economies. Their dedication, farming practices are transforming agriculture and strengthening communities worldwide.

Modern farmers embrace eco-friendly methods that preserve soil health, conserve water, and minimize chemical use. This hands-on approach to cultivation ensures healthy crops while protecting the environment for future generations.

Women farmers are not just growing food—they're nurturing families, creating economic opportunities, and building resilient rural communities. Their work ensures food security while inspiring the next generation to value agriculture and sustainable living.
detail.highlight: Harvesting your own vegetables ensures maximum freshness, superior taste, and peak nutritional value that store-bought produce cannot match. Direct-from-farm food
